pastes.subtitle: PHOTOGRAPHY GEAR
pastes.content:
Essentials

Cameras:
- Sony A6700 (kit)

Lenses:
- Sigma 24-70 f2.8 DG DN II ART

Memory cards:
- SanDisk 128GB Extreme PRO UHS-I SDXC (with A6700 kit)
- SanDisk 128GB Extreme PRO UHS-II SDXC (maximum video quality)
- Lexar 256GB Professional 1667x UHS-II SDXC (main photography drive)

Tripods:
- Ulanzi & Coman Zero Y tripod

Flashes:
- Godox V1 PRO

Chargers:
- Jupio tri-charge for Sony NP-FZ100 (also card holder)

Batteries:
- Sony NP-FZ100 (3x)
- Godox VB-30 (1x)


Accessories

Lens filters:
- PolarPro 82mm QuartzLine Circular Polarizer
- Hoya UV-HMC 82mm

Support:
- Peak Design Slide Camera Strap
- Peak Design Capture Clip v3
- Peak Design Cuff Camera Wrist
- Sony Strap


Miscellaneous

Backpacks:
- K&F Concept Beta Photography Backpack 20L
- Ruggard Hunter 35 DSLR Holster (with A6700 kit)
- AK-R1 flash kit
